name: the-council-capstone
description: The Council: Multi-Agent Verification Swarm capstone demo with offline fixture mode.

scripts.demo:car-wash: node demo_fixture.mjs "I want to wash my car. The car wash is 50 meters away. Should I walk or drive?"
scripts.test: node tests/ops_smoke.mjs && node tests/claims_smoke.mjs && node tests/capstone_smoke.mjs
scripts.verify:capstone: npm run demo:fixture && npm test && npm run secret:scan && npm run mcp:self-test
